view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that a customer can enroll in the program and attend multiple sessions. Specifically, the scenario describes Sarah enrolling in the 'Yoga Teacher Training' program, attending 11 out of 12 sessions, and successfully completing the program. This directly supports the requirement that a user can enroll once and attend multiple sessions, as there is no indication of any limitation on attendance after enrollment.
